zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edward Cherleton於1371年出生在英國威爾斯波斯時，他的父親John de Cherleton 3rd Baron Cherleton of Powis36歲，母親Joan II Stafford28歲。他和Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton至少有2個女兒。他去世於1421年3月14日在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾卡素享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: Cherleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Charlton
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): habitational name from North Charlton or Charlton near Bellingham (both Northumberland) or from any of the many other places so named (there are over ninety examples in England), from Old English Ceorlatūn ‘settlement (Old English tūn) of the peasants’. Old English ceorl denoted originally a free peasant of the lowest rank, later (but probably already before the Norman conquest) a tenant in pure villeinage, a serf or bondsman.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edward Cherleton was born in 1371, in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, John de Cherleton 3rd Baron Cherleton of Powis, was 36 and his mother, Joan II Stafford, was 28. He had at least 2 daughters with Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton. He died on 14 March 1421, in Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales, at the age of 50.

Il a eu au moins 2 filles avec Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton. Il est décédé le 14 mars 1421, à Castle, Montgomeryshire, Galles, à l’âge de 50 ans.

Er hatte mit Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 14. März 1421 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Cherletonが1371年にイギリスウェールズポウイスで生まれた時，父John de Cherleton 3rd Baron Cherleton of Powisは36歳，母Joan II Staffordは28歳であった。彼はLady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness cheretonとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1421年3月14日にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアカストルで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Cherleton(이)가 1371년 영국 웨일스 파우이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Cherleton 3rd Baron Cherleton of Powis(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan II Stafford(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1421년 3월 14일 웨일스 몽고머이실르 카스틀에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edward Cherleton родился в 1371 г. в местности поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Cherleton 3rd Baron Cherleton of Powis было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan II Stafford, 28. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton. Он умер 14 марта 1421 г. в местности кастл, монтгомиришир, Уэльс в возрасте 50 лет.
